text.title: Agent Postmortem Template (Agent-as-Defendant) Decision Tree
text.summary: Decision tree gating whether agent-postmortem-template applies. Root question is a yes/no observable on the incoming task; branches name a concrete observable (`when`) and conclude either with a rule reference from 01-core-rules.xml or with a skip directive.

decision-tree.root-question: Did the incident involve an agent decision (not pure infra)?

example.description: When `yes` holds, the tree concludes `rule:r1` — meaning the methodology applies via that specific rule. The agent should load the referenced rule from 01-core-rules.xml and follow it.
